title: Robust Spicy Norwegian Perilla Leaf Casserole
description: A hearty and spicy Norwegian casserole featuring perilla leaves, perfect for a sick day, with a cheese pull and sugar-free friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Brown the ground beef in a pan and set aside.
Soak the dehydrated perilla leaves in hot water for 10 minutes.
Sauté the onion and garlic until the onion is translucent.
Combine the browned ground beef, sautéed onion and garlic, and soaked perilla leaves in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, mix the heavy cream and shredded cheddar cheese.
Add the cream and cheese mixture to the bowl with the beef and perilla leaves.
Stir in the dried thyme and cayenne pepper.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
